subject: Civic Education

lesson.title: Role-playing
topics: Divide class into small groups and assign each group a scenario about a specific special
group (the blind, the infirm, the hearing impaired, the refugees)
Ask each group to role play the scenario using the role- playing cards or scripts
activities: Teacher to engage groups into a question-and-answer session
What did you learn about special people?
How can we promote empathy and understanding in our daily lives?
Social justice is the belief that everyone deserves equal rights, opportunities, and fair treatment,
regardless of their background, status, or differences. It focuses on creating a society where everyone is
Two essential values in social justice are kindness and empathy.
